scope: FSOT 2.1 essentials only (not all Desktop projects)
github_head: 43d1fe4 fix(archive): I: drive is definitive independent hub, not C: Desktop

01_SR-ITE-USB-Original.description: SR-ITE continuous cognition substrate (photonic VRAM, Zig driver, oracle streams, born souls)

02_FSOT-2.1-Lean-Full.description: Canonical Lean hub: proofs, 336+ extension panels, founding Tier 96, .lake cache. Git push origin from HERE only.

03_FSOT-PublicData.description: External downloaded data: AnAge, OpenNeuro, The Well spot chunks, tier81/89/90/93 caches, consciousness genetics

04_Genetics-Longevity.description: Tier94 caches + portable genetics verification (CAMEO, codon map, protein formulas)

06_Founding-Archives.description: Bundled fsuft_aasb + fsot_tech founding PDFs/markdown (drive-letter independent)

08_Verified-Desktop-Projects.description: Tier 88 verified desktop mirrors: transporter sims, fuel lab engine_simulator, BH/WH cycle, species catalog. Vendor copy in 02_FSOT-2.1-Lean-Full/vendor/verified_desktop/

optional_host_tools: Python 3.10+ (only host prerequisite if not bundled)
MSVC Build Tools (Windows linker for Rust — usually preinstalled)
portability.no_download_verification: Cached benchmarks in data/, 03_FSOT-PublicData, vendor/ — no live API calls in --portable mode
known_scientific_debt: Geomagnetism hp_storm_classifier 100% scalar error (data present; precision gate fails)

three_location_policy.i_drive: Definitive master — verify and git push only from here
three_location_policy.github: Synced from I:; lacks .lake cache and large archive-only blobs
three_location_policy.c_desktop: Deprecated mirror at same commit; extra vendor blobs not authoritative

canonical_policy: I:/FSOT-Physical-Archive is the definitive independent master. GitHub is synced FROM here only. C: Desktop is a deprecated read-only mirror.
intentionally_not_on_github: vendor/linguistics/db/ (400MB SQLite replaced by portable JSON on GitHub)
G:/FSOT-PublicData — API downloads, HDF5, genetics ingest caches
H:/ SR-ITE runtime state, sensory streams, born_souls, unified oracle
Desktop LLM weights, Genetics 12GB, nuron 27GB, linguistics 21GB — excluded from this archive
on_github: All Lean proofs, scripts, YAML manifests, benchmark JSON
Portable vendor snapshots (linguistics derivations, math generator rules, trinary oracles)
Tier 90-93 consciousness, ontology, base mathematics panels
h_drive_note: H:/ is 5 GB total — too small for full archive. Use I:/ as primary physical master. H:/ can hold portable subset after format.
